headline: GOOGL, APP, CCJ oversold. GOOGL and CCJ cooling below MA50. Entry window open.
marketContext: Cycle is in Transition / verification (confidence 81%) — posture is watch_only. Fundamentals are running ahead of price in Nuclear / AI Power Infrastructure and Enterprise / AI Software SaaS Dislocation — the market's fear is the opportunity. Index-Level Calm vs. Stock-Level Dispersion, Speculative Nuclear-Adjacent & Space Unwind is priced ahead of fundamentals — don't chase.
groupAContext: APP (RSI 32.4, -46.5% from peak), BWXT (RSI 40.8, -26.9% from peak), PLTR (RSI 42.5, -40.6% from peak), CLS (RSI 46.3, -29.4% from peak), AVGO (RSI 51.9, -20.7% from peak) are cooling — early-entry thesis intact. Best setup: APP at RSI 32.4 — -46.5% from 52-week high with narrative not yet priced by institutions.
groupBContext: GOOGL (RSI 31), CCJ (RSI 38.4) are technically oversold — historically a high-quality entry signal for moat names. NXT (RSI 43, -15% vs MA50), TSM (RSI 46.3, -2% vs MA50) are below MA50 with cooling RSI — approaching entry range. Highest conviction: TSM (score 78) — use RSI and MA50 levels to time entry, not to validate the thesis.

topEntry.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
topEntry.why: RSI 46.3 (cooling), 2.4% below MA50, -13.2% from 52-week high. Conviction score 78.

frameworkPanel.thesis: Plateau rates ~3-3.5%, no zero-rate rescue, adjustment risk elevated (Jun)
frameworkPanel.verdict: PARTIALLY SUPPORTED — treat as a ~30-40% scenario, not a base case.
frameworkPanel.sizing: Run ~60-70% offense / 30-40% defense+hedge rather than either extreme.
frameworkPanel.activation: Activation trigger: Baa-10Y credit spread widening past ~2.5 while Fed holds (now 1.58)
frameworkPanel.calibration_finding: Measured across 377 names (6m forward): deep dislocation (>35% below high) won only 35.7% of the time; names within 10% of highs won 58% (median 5.6%). Dislocation depth has been NEGATIVE alpha in this regime — buy stabilization, not depth.

book2.exit: out if hyperscaler capex guidance cracks
hard stop below 20-day base — biotech is binary
cut if silver loses 50 while gold holds

protocol: Deploy ~2/3 of long-term capital through the Sep-Oct window (Sep 16 FOMC -> late-October pre-midterm low). The calendar is a TENDENCY, not a law — credit spreads, VIX, breadth, and price action override it. A calendar date never justifies buying into deteriorating credit.

Hold ~1/3 as crash reserve. Deploys ONLY if: (a) Baa-10Y credit spread > 2.5 while Fed holds (now 1.56), or (b) SPX -15%+ drawdown. Base rates: buying the widest-spread bucket had the best forward returns and zero negative 12-month outcomes.

tripleAlignment.regime: Hawkish Fed repricing (~2/3 Sept hike priced), real 10Y 2.23%, credit tight (HY OAS 2.72), no stress
